Credit Dashboard
Secured Start
Welcome Back
Let's get your credit back on track. Follow the steps below.
Step 1 of 6 — Import Report 0%

Step 1: How CreditPulse Works

CreditPulse guides you through every round of your dispute — from the first bureau letter all the way to legal escalation if needed.

CreditPulse tracks each account across multiple dispute rounds, generates the exact follow-up letter each situation legally requires, and escalates automatically when bureaus don't comply.

Rounds 1–2 · Bureau Disputes FCRA § 611

We send dispute letters to Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. They have 30 days to investigate. If they verify without proof or simply ignore you, CreditPulse issues a targeted follow-up.

Round 3 · Direct Furnisher Disputes FCRA § 623

If bureaus keep verifying inaccurate data, CreditPulse bypasses them entirely and disputes directly with the original creditor or data furnisher — the source of the problem.

Round 4+ · Legal Escalation FCRA § 616 / § 617

Persistent non-compliance triggers a Notice of Intent to Sue, CFPB complaint guidance, and a referral to consumer law attorneys — many of whom take these cases on contingency (no upfront cost).

What CreditPulse handles for you
Tracks every account per round
Picks the right follow-up letter
30-day deadline countdown
Escalates when bureaus stall
Deleted items drop off automatically
All 3 bureaus covered

Step 2: Import Your Credit Report

Upload a PDF or HTML credit report from any bureau. We'll scan it for errors and violations.

Bank-level encryption
Files never shared
Private & secure

Drop your credit report here or click to browse

Supports PDF and HTML formats from all 3 bureaus

0%
Report uploaded successfully!

Step 3: Violation Detection

We found potential violations in your report. Review each one and decide which to dispute.

Accounts per page

No violations detected yet

Run an audit on your uploaded report to find issues.

Step 4: Generate & Send Dispute Letters

Generate your letters, download PDFs, and mark each one as sent once you mail them.

No letters generated yet

Generate your dispute letters to see them here.

Step 5: Dispute Tracker

Track each round of disputes. For every account, tell us what the bureau said — we'll prepare the right follow-up.

Ready to start tracking?

Once you've sent your dispute letters, start Round 1 here. We'll walk you through recording each bureau's response.

Round 1 — Bureau Disputes

Round History

Step 6: Score Improvement Tools

See what actions could improve your credit score and simulate the impact.

Suggested Actions

Add Authorized User Tradeline
Being added as an authorized user on a seasoned account can boost your score.
+25-45 pts
Reduce Credit Utilization
Paying down balances below 30% of your limit has an immediate impact.
+20-40 pts
Remove Collection Account
Successfully disputing or settling a collection can significantly boost your score.
+30-50 pts
Remove Hard Inquiry
Unauthorized hard inquiries can be disputed and removed from your report.
+5-15 pts

Set Your Score Goal

Goal saved!

Credit Score Simulator

Projected Score
620
+0 pts
